_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Specify discipline-specific collections and/or taskings that must be executed in the near term.
reference_document_element_description: Manage program execution, including workstream coordination, issue resolution, scope change management, and executive status reporting.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-001 (DG, cosine: 0.408), DG-T-008 (DG, cosine: 0.359).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.6/10 (raw 0.358). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [collections, discipline, executed, must, near, specific] vs WIDAI-only terms [change, coordination, execution, executive, issue, manage] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.858 (P=0.865, R=0.851). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 15-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Specify discipline-specific collections and/or taskings that must be executed in" and "Manage program execution, including workstream coordination, issue resolution, s" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.416 > STS 0.358 (gap +0.058). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.5%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [collections, discipline, executed, must, near, specific]. WIDAI terms: [change, coordination, execution, executive, issue, manage].
